---
title: Leveraging Global Genetics Resources to Enhance Polygenic Prediction Across Ancestrally Diverse Populations
output: 
  html_document:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 2
    css: styles/styles.css
    includes:
      in_header: header.html
      after_body: footer.html

---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(eval = FALSE)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(data.table)
```

<style>
pre code, pre, code {
  white-space: pre !important;
  overflow-x: scroll !important;
  word-break: keep-all !important;
  word-wrap: initial !important;
}

ul li p, ol li p {
  margin: 0 !important;
}
</style>

Configuration created using the wizard. Stored here: `~/oliverpainfel/Data/eGFR_collab/config`

```{}
# config.yaml
outdir: /users/k1806347/oliverpainfel/Data/eGFR_collab/output
config_file: /users/k1806347/oliverpainfel/Data/eGFR_collab/config/config.yaml
pgs_methods: ['quickprs','sbayesrc','ldpred2','ptclump','prscsx','prscs']
leopard_methods: ['quickprs','sbayesrc','ldpred2','prscs']
pgs_methods: ['ptclump','quickprs','dbslmm','lassosum','megaprs','prscs','ldpred2','sbayesrc','prscsx']
leopard_methods: ['ptclump','quickprs','dbslmm','lassosum','megaprs','prscs','ldpred2','sbayesrc']
gwas_list: /users/k1806347/oliverpainfel/Data/eGFR_collab/config/gwas_list.txt
gwas_groups: /users/k1806347/oliverpainfel/Data/eGFR_collab/config/gwas_groups.txt
ldpred2_ldref: /users/k1806347/oliverpainfel/Data/hgdp_1kg/ldpred2/hm3_clean

# gwas_groups.txt
name gwas label
egfr egfr_afr,egfr_eur "eGFR (multi-source)"

# gwas_list.txt
name path population n label sampling prevalence mean sd
egfr_afr /users/k1806347/oliverpainfel/Data/eGFR_collab/sumstats/all_afr_no_aou_summary_stat_hg38.txt.gz AFR NA "eGFR (AFR)" NA NA NA NA
egfr_eur /users/k1806347/oliverpainfel/Data/eGFR_collab/sumstats/eur_ukbb_egfrcrea_summary_stat_hg38.txt.gz EUR NA "eGFR (EUR)" NA NA NA NA

```

```{bash}
gp
snakemake \
  --profile slurm \
  --configfile=/users/k1806347/oliverpainfel/Data/eGFR_collab/config/config.yaml \
  --use-conda \
  output_all -n


snakemake \
  --profile slurm \
  --configfile=/users/k1806347/oliverpainfel/Data/eGFR_collab/config/config.yaml \
  --use-conda \
  prep_pgs_sbayesrc -n
```

```{bash}
# --- CONFIG ---
traits=(HT HB PLT BMI BWT MCHC SBP NEU HDL TC)
pgs_methods=(sbayesrc ptclump)

base="/users/k1806347/oliverpainfel/Analyses/mind_the_gap/GenoPred/output_sbayesrc_sparse/reference/pgs_score_files/"
out="/users/k1806347/oliverpainfel/Analyses/mind_the_gap/GenoPred/output_sbayesrc_sparse/score_file_wgs_sparse.txt"
tmpdir="$(mktemp -d)"
cleanup() { rm -rf "$tmpdir"; }
trap cleanup EXIT

# --- 1) Grab columns 1–3 (SNP, A1, A2) from the first available file ---
ref_file=""
for trait in "${traits[@]}"; do
  for method in "${pgs_methods[@]}"; do
    test_file="${base}/${method}/UKB_WGS_${trait}/ref-UKB_WGS_${trait}.score.gz"
    if [[ -f "$test_file" ]]; then
      ref_file="$test_file"
      break 2
    fi
  done
done

if [[ -z "$ref_file" ]]; then
  echo "Error: No reference score file found — cannot build header."
  exit 1
fi

echo "Using reference: $ref_file"

gzip -dc "$ref_file" \
  | awk 'BEGIN{OFS=" "} {print $1,$2,$3}' \
  > "${tmpdir}/ref_cols.txt"

# --- 2) Extract columns 4..end from each available file ---
col_files=()
for trait in "${traits[@]}"; do
  for method in "${pgs_methods[@]}"; do
    f="${base}/${method}/UKB_WGS_${trait}/ref-UKB_WGS_${trait}.score.gz"
    outcols="${tmpdir}/${method}_${trait}.cols.txt"

    # Skip if file missing or empty
    if [[ ! -s "$f" ]]; then
      echo "Skipping missing file: $f"
      continue
    fi

    echo "Processing $f"
    gzip -dc "$f" | awk -v m="$method" -v t="$trait" '
      BEGIN { FS="[ \t]+"; OFS=" " }
      NR==1 {
        for (i=4;i<=NF;i++) {
          gsub(/^SCORE/, m"_"t"_SCORE", $i)
        }
        for (i=4;i<=NF;i++) out = (i==4 ? $i : out OFS $i)
        print out; out=""
        next
      }
      {
        for (i=4;i<=NF;i++) out = (i==4 ? $i : out OFS $i)
        print out; out=""
      }' > "$outcols"

    col_files+=("$outcols")
  done
done

if [[ ${#col_files[@]} -eq 0 ]]; then
  echo "No score columns found to combine."
fi

# --- 3) Paste reference cols + all available score columns ---
paste -d' ' "${tmpdir}/ref_cols.txt" "${col_files[@]}" > "$out"

# Compress and upload to project
gzip -f $out
dx upload $out.gz --path mind_the_gap/score_files/sparse/

```
